test_summary: Read tasks.md and all eight assigned workflow files. Verified every workflow uses: ref is pinned to a 40-character SHA; focused rg checks found no active non-SHA action refs and no @main, @master, @latest, DeterminateSystems/*@main, govulncheck@latest, or go-licenses@latest refs. Confirmed security tool installs are pinned: govulncheck@v1.5.0, gosec@v2.27.1, go-licenses@v1.6.0, and Trivy/Syft actions by commit SHA. Ran actionlint on the eight assigned workflow files; it passed.
notes: Codebase map relevance self-check: not read because t-03 is limited to static workflow/action pinning and security tool version verification, and tasks.md plus the assigned workflow files were sufficient. Warning: DeterminateSystems original @main refs are intentionally preserved only in comments beside commit SHA pins. No repository-wide Go tests were run.
